positive: A minimalist, stylized jungle fox in a dynamic, mid-leap pose, captured against a deep indigo twilight sky. The fox has sleek, geometric fur textures and emits a subtle, glowing cyan energy trail. Surrounding the fox are stylized tropical flora—giant, stylized monstera leaves and neon-lit, crystalline orchids—designed with strong black outlines and vibrant pops of complementary color (lime green, electric blue, magenta). The composition is highly symmetrical and centered, suitable for a chest print. Use a bold linework art style, reminiscent of modern Japanese Ukiyo-e mixed with geometric vector illustration. The lighting is dramatic and moody, highlighting the fox's silhouette and giving the image a strong, graphic, two-dimensional feel. High contrast, clean color separation, ideal for apparel printing.
negative: blurry, deformed, extra limbs, bad anatomy, text, watermark, signature, copyright, logo, low detail, grainy, noise, realistic photograph, photorealism, fuzzy, messy, grunge
